prompt: Edit image 1: Redesign the Windows Settings interface shown on the canvas, applying the dark left navigation sidebar style and the modern, flat color palette from the web interface in image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Redesign the Windows Settings interface visible within the main canvas area. Apply the dark grey background and flat design style of the left navigation sidebar from image 2 to the corresponding left navigation pane in image 1. Additionally, update the entire Windows Settings interface in image 1 to adopt the modern, flat color palette and aesthetic from image 2, incorporating its clean whites, light greys, and light blue accents.
objects: Left navigation pane with dark grey background and flat design style
Main content area with modern, flat color palette (clean whites, light greys, light blue accents)
Search bar within the left navigation pane
Navigation categories (e.g., System, Display, Battery) within the left navigation pane
"Overview" title in the main content area
"Battery saver" section with its toggle, checkbox, and descriptive text
